vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness at the wing spar reinforcement interface.
risk.mit: Perform additional stress analysis and consider reinforcing materials.

risk.desc: Limited access for maintenance due to tight integration of components.
risk.mit: Design service access points and ensure clear labeling for maintenance.

risk.desc: Thermal management challenges with the cooling inlet design.
risk.mit: Optimize the cooling inlet geometry for improved airflow efficiency.

risk.desc: Process limitations with FDM + foam may affect surface finish.
risk.mit: Conduct surface finish tests and adjust process parameters if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex interfaces.
risk.mit: Implement alignment aids and detailed assembly instructions.

physics_paths.description: Cooling air flows through the motor pod to dissipate heat.
The equipment bay door opens and closes along the wing structure.
Structural loads from the wing spar are transferred to the pod shell.

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate the wing spar reinforcement with the pod shell for better load distribution.
Ensure the bay door interface allows easy access for maintenance.
Optimize the cooling inlet design for efficient airflow.

generated_parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12

requirements: Provide structural support for the wing planform
Include NACA airfoil profile with lightening pockets
Feature leading edge sock and trailing edge taper
Integrate control surface cutouts with hinges
Ensure spar socket for wing spar integration
Maintain structural integrity under expected loads
Facilitate airflow over NACA airfoil section
Allow for service access and payload integration

verify.value: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
verify.rule: Ensure all required fields are included and properly filled.

verify.value: Total mass estimated at 180g per rib, within the 200g limit.
verify.rule: Ensure total mass does not exceed 200g per rib.

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness at lightening pocket locations.
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness around lightening pockets and perform stress analysis.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during spar socket installation.
risk.mit: Add alignment pins and visual guides to ensure proper socket placement.

risk.desc: Hinge line may experience wear over extended use.
risk.mit: Use wear-resistant materials for hinge components and conduct regular inspections.

risk.desc: Service access holes may obstruct airflow over NACA airfoil section.
risk.mit: Optimize hole placement to minimize aerodynamic impact.

risk.desc: Trailing edge taper may affect lift distribution.
risk.mit: Perform CFD analysis to validate lift distribution and adjust taper if necessary.

verification_focus.description: Ensure total mass does not exceed 200g per rib
Verify spar socket and hinge line integrity under expected loads
Test airflow over NACA airfoil section in wind tunnel

risk.desc: Potential interference between control horn socket and adjacent components.
risk.mit: Review and adjust the position of the control horn socket to ensure clearance.

risk.desc: Insufficient strain relief geometry for cables exiting the servo pocket.
risk.mit: Add strain relief features such as clamps or grommets to protect cables.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly due to lack of clear visual indicators.
risk.mit: Include visual alignment aids like color coding or directional arrows.

risk.desc: Possible thermal issues if heat dissipation from the servo is inadequate.
risk.mit: Ensure proper airflow paths and consider adding fins or heat sinks.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening bolts leading to damage during assembly.
risk.mit: Specify torque limits and provide tools with appropriate torque settings.
